info.title: Run402 API
info.description: Full-stack infrastructure for AI agents. Postgres, REST API, auth, file storage, static site hosting, serverless functions. Paid via x402 USDC micropayments on Base — no signups, no dashboards.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Provision, renew, and manage database projects

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: User signup, login, token refresh, and logout

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: SQL migrations, RLS policies, usage, and schema introspection

tags.name: REST
tags.description: PostgREST proxy — full CRUD on your tables

tags.name: Storage
tags.description: Upload, download, delete, sign, and list files

tags.name: Functions
tags.description: Serverless function deploy, invoke, logs, and secrets

get.description: Lists all x402-gated resources and their prices for automated discovery.
Returns available tiers and their pricing. No auth required. Useful for programmatic price discovery before provisioning.

post.description: Creates a new database project. Requires x402 payment. Default tier is prototype ($0.10 USDC).
Same as GET /v1/projects — returns tier pricing info.

post.summary: Provision a project with a specific tier

post.description: Extends the project lease via x402 payment.
Executes SQL against the project database. Dangerous statements (CREATE EXTENSION, ALTER SYSTEM, etc.) are blocked.
Applies a row-level security template to one or more tables.

tables.description: Table names to apply the policy to

get.description: Returns full schema introspection: tables, columns, constraints, RLS policies.

post.description: Pins a project so its lease never expires. Requires x-admin-key header.
Unpins a project, restoring normal lease expiry. Requires x-admin-key header.

get.description: Proxies GET requests to PostgREST. Supports all PostgREST query parameters (select, order, limit, offset, filters). The apikey header determines the role (anon or authenticated user).

post.description: Proxies POST requests to PostgREST for inserting rows.

patch.description: Proxies PATCH requests to PostgREST for updating rows. Use query parameters to filter which rows to update.

delete.description: Proxies DELETE requests to PostgREST. Use query parameters to filter which rows to delete.

post.description: Uploads a file to the specified bucket. Max 10MB.
Generates a pre-signed URL for direct file access. Expires in 1 hour.
Sends testnet USDC to the specified wallet address on Base Sepolia. Rate limited to 1 drip per IP per 24 hours.

429.description: Rate limited — 1 drip per IP per 24 hours

post.description: Admin-only faucet with no rate limit and optional custom amount. Requires x-admin-key.

get.description: Returns deployment pricing and usage info. No auth required.

post.description: Deploys static files to a live URL at {id}.sites.run402.com. Supports HTML, CSS, JS, images. SPA-ready with automatic fallback routing. Max 50MB total. Idempotent with Idempotency-Key header.

project.description: Optional project ID to associate with

put.description: Register or update agent contact info (name, email, webhook) tied to the paying wallet. $0.001 USDC.

400.description: Validation error (missing name, invalid email, non-https webhook)

post.description: Sends a paid message (feedback, contact) to the Run402 team via Telegram. Idempotent.
Generates an image via AI. Requires x402 payment.

get.description: Lists all projects associated with a wallet address.

post.description: Maps a custom subdomain ({name}.run402.com) to a deployment.
Deploys a JavaScript/TypeScript function to AWS Lambda. Returns an invocation URL.

parameters.name: tail
parameters.description: Number of log lines to return

post.description: Sets an environment variable available to all functions in the project.

get.description: Invokes a deployed function. Supports any HTTP method. Subroutes are forwarded.

200.description: Tier pricing and request body schema

post.description: Deploys project + database + migrations + RLS + secrets + functions + site + subdomain in one call.

post.summary: Publish app as a forkable version

post.description: Creates a fully independent project from a published app version.

apikey.name: apikey
apikey.description: Project anon_key (JWT). Returned when you provision a project.

bearerAuth.description: User access_token from /auth/v1/token. Pass as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

serviceKey.description: Project service_key (JWT with service_role). Returned when you provision a project. Pass as Authorization: Bearer <service_key>.

adminKey.name: x-admin-key
adminKey.description: Server admin key. Required for pin/unpin and admin faucet.

x402.name: X-PAYMENT
x402.description: x402 payment header. The client library (e.g. @anthropic-ai/sdk x402 facilitator) handles this automatically. Payment is in USDC on Base (mainnet eip155:8453 or testnet eip155:84532).

PaymentRequired.description: Payment required. The response includes x402 payment instructions (network, token, amount, payee address). Use an x402-compatible client to automatically handle payment.

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid authentication. Provide apikey header (anon_key) or Authorization: Bearer (service_key/access_token).
